---
pagetitle: "Open Science Initiative in Medicine"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}

<div>
    <h2 class="mb-0" style="border-bottom: none;">
        <span class="fw-bold">LMU</span>
        <span class="fw-light"> Open Science Initiative in Medicine</span>
    </h2>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-2">
    <div class="row align-items-center">
        <div class="col-md-9 p-0">
            <p style="line-height: 1.6; text-align: justify;">
                Founded in January 2019, the LMU Open Science Initiative in Medicine (OSIM) aims to promote open science 
                in medicine by developing training programs and offering strategies on how to improve effectiveness and 
                reproducibility of basic and clinical medical research.
                Together with the LMU Open Science Center, our final goal is to improve scientific practices and 
                reproducibility in medical research at LMU and beyond.
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <img src="images/osim.png" class="img-fluid" style="max-height:150px;" alt="OSIM logo">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-3">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Current Organizers
    </h4>
    <ul class="mt-0 osc-init-organizer-list">
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/luisa-jimenez-soto.html" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                PD. Dr. Luisa F. Jiménez-Soto (Chair)
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/julian-lange.html" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Julian Lange, M.Sc. (Coordinator)
            </a>
        </li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-3">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Senior Members
    </h4>
    <ul class="mt-0 osc-init-organizer-list">
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/anne-laure-boulesteix.html" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Prof. Dr. Anne-Laure Boulesteix
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/eva-hoster.html" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Prof. Dr. Eva Hoster
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="/people/people/nikolaus-plesnila.html" class="text-decoration-none text-black osc-init-people-link">
                Prof. Dr. Nikolaus Plesnila
            </a>
        </li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-3">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
      Resources
    </h4>
    <ul class="list-unstyled mt-0 d-flex flex-column gap-3">
        <li>
            <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@lmuopenscienceinitiativein447/videos" rel="noopener"
               class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 text-decoration-none" style="cursor: pointer; width:fit-content;">
                <span class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm"
                      style="width:56px; height:56px; background-color:#fde8e8;">
                    <i class="bi bi-youtube" style="font-size:1.6rem; color:#c0392b;"></i>
                </span>
                <span>
                    <span class="d-block fw-semibold text-black">YouTube channel</span>
                    <span class="d-block text-muted small">Recorded talks</span>
                </span>
            </a>
        </li>
        <li>
            <a href="https://osf.io/kyvut/overview" rel="noopener"
               class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 text-decoration-none" style="cursor: pointer; width:fit-content;">
                <img src="https://osf.io/static/img/institutions/shields/cos-shield.png"
                     alt="OSF" class="rounded-3 flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm"
                     style="width:56px; height:56px; object-fit:contain; background-color:#e2f0fe; padding:8px;">
                <span>
                    <span class="d-block fw-semibold text-black">OSF repository</span>
                    <span class="d-block text-muted small">Workshops and meetup materials</span>
                </span>
            </a>
        </li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="container px-0">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Get Involved
    </h4>
    <p style="line-height: 1.6;" class="mb-3">
        If you are a faculty member of LMU medical science and want to join the initiative, 
        do not hesitate to contact us. Questions or any ideas regarding the initiative or its 
        meetings/workshops are welcome!
    </p>
    <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-center flex-wrap justify-content-center mt-3">
        <a href="mailto:jimenez@lmu.de;julian.lange@ibe.med.uni-muenchen.de" class="btn btn-primary osc-init-contact-btn">
            <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact OSIM team
        </a>
        <a href="https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/osim" class="btn btn-outline-primary osc-init-contact-btn" rel="noopener">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Join Mailing list
        </a>
    </div>
</div>
```
